text:
How about this? It happened one morning.

Oliver opened his eyes. It was light. He rubbed his eyes. The sun felt warm. His sister was waving at him.

"Good morning, Oliver!" she shouted. She was dancing around in her bed. She put on a big pink bow on her head.

Ollie yawned. He wasn't quite awake yet. He picked up her phone. It was a cute picture of a puppy.

"Let's take a selfie!" he said.

She grinned. "Okay," she said. She waved at the photo. Then, "Wait!"

"What?"

She turned the phone towards him. "Look!"

She pressed the shutter button. "Now?"

"What?" He squinted through sleep. It was a cute puppy in a fluffy soft toy costume.

"It's not a puppy," she corrected. "It could be a frog."<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
